contracts.name: AI Conversation Interface
contracts.description: Complete behavioral contract for AI chat interactions with message sending, streaming responses, and error handling

triggers.event: User submits message via Enter key or Send button click
stateChanges: Input field clears and resets to empty state
User message appears in message list with fade-up animation
Typing indicator displays in assistant bubble position
Send button transitions to disabled state
Message list auto-scrolls to bottom to show latest content
Internal message ID is assigned and tracked

networkError.display: Inline error message in assistant position with red background
networkError.action: Show retry button next to error message
networkError.dismissal: Auto-dismiss after 5 seconds or manual click

timeout.display: Timeout alert in assistant position with countdown timer reset option
timeout.action: Show retry button to resubmit message

rateLimit.display: Rate limit message with countdown timer showing seconds until next send allowed
rateLimit.action: Disable send button and show timer

triggers.event: User clicks regenerate button on assistant message
stateChanges: Previous assistant message fades out or becomes semi-transparent
New typing indicator appears in same position
Regenerate button becomes disabled
Message list maintains scroll position or scrolls to new typing indicator
New message ID is generated for tracking

regenerateFailed.action: Show retry button to attempt regeneration again

triggers.event: User clicks edit button on their own message
preconditions: Message is not currently being edited
stateChanges: Message bubble transitions to editable state with input field
Original text populates in editable field
Confirm and cancel buttons appear
Other messages remain visible but slightly faded
Send button in main input area becomes disabled

editTimeout.action: Offer to copy text and start fresh message

triggers.event: User clicks reaction emoji on any message
preconditions: Reaction menu is not currently open
stateChanges: Reaction count increments on message
User avatar appears in reaction pill if this is a new reaction type
Reaction is stored server-side
Animation plays on reaction pill

reactionFailed.display: Reaction reverts visually with undo toast

transitions.trigger: user starts typing in input field
user clicks edit on their message
user cancels edit or confirms changes

contracts.name: Data Table Filtering
contracts.description: Behavioral contract for filtering data in data grids with column-level and global filters

triggers.event: User clicks filter icon in column header
preconditions: No other filter menu is open
stateChanges: Filter menu dropdown appears below column header
Active filters show as checked checkboxes or filled input
Menu positions itself within viewport bounds
Overlay appears behind menu for dismiss on click outside
Column header highlights to show active filter state

filterLoadError.display: Error message in filter menu with reload button
filterLoadError.action: Allow user to retry loading filter options

triggers.event: User selects filter criteria and applies filter
preconditions: At least one filter option is selected
stateChanges: Filter menu closes
Data grid shows loading skeleton rows
Table rows update to show only filtered data
Row count badge updates to reflect filtered count
Column header shows visual indicator of active filter
Pagination resets to page one
Filter state is stored in URL query parameters

filterApplyError.display: Toast error message with undo option

triggers.event: User clicks clear filter button or removes all selections
preconditions: At least one filter is active
Clear button is visible in menu
stateChanges: All filter selections are deselected
Data grid reloads with all rows visible
Filter badge disappears from column header
Row count returns to total count
Pagination resets to page one
URL query parameters are updated or removed

clearError.action: Keep filter state until retry succeeds

contracts.name: Chat Message Actions
contracts.description: Behavioral contract for message-level actions like copy, react, pin, and delete in chat interfaces

triggers.event: User hovers over message bubble
preconditions: User is on desktop or touch-hover capable device
stateChanges: Action buttons appear at top-right of message
Buttons include copy, react, and more options menu
Background highlight appears around message
Buttons fade in with staggered animation

triggers.event: User clicks copy button on message
stateChanges: Message text is copied to clipboard
Copy button shows confirmation state
Tooltip or toast shows success message
Button reverts to normal state after delay

clipboardDenied.display: Toast message explaining clipboard access denied
clipboardDenied.action: Offer to select text manually instead

triggers.event: User clicks delete button and confirms deletion
preconditions: Message can be deleted by policy
stateChanges: Confirmation dialog appears
Message is marked as deleting or dimmed
Upon confirmation, message is removed from list
Message space is animated away
Delete action is sent to server
If failed, message reappears with error

deleteNotPermitted.display: Error message explaining deletion not permitted

contracts.name: Approval Workflow
contracts.description: Behavioral contract for multi-step approval processes with notifications and state tracking

triggers.event: User opens approval request detail view
preconditions: Request exists and is in pending state
User has permission to view request
stateChanges: Request details panel opens
Approval history timeline displays
Current approver badge shows who approval is waiting on
Approve and reject buttons are enabled
Comment section is visible and ready for input
Related context information loads in sidebar

triggers.event: User clicks approve button and submits approval
preconditions: Request is still in pending state
stateChanges: Confirmation dialog appears asking to confirm approval
Optional comment field is shown for approval notes
Approve button becomes disabled
Upon confirmation, approval is submitted to server
Button shows loading state with spinner
After success, panel shows approved state with timestamp
Next approver notification is sent if workflow continues

triggers.event: User clicks reject button and provides rejection reason
stateChanges: Rejection reason dialog appears with required text field
Reject button becomes disabled
Comment field is focused for input
Upon submission, rejection is sent to server
Button shows loading state
After success, request moves to rejected status
Requester is notified of rejection
Workflow stops and request requires resubmission

contracts.name: Notification System
contracts.description: Behavioral contract for toast notifications, snackbars, and notification center

triggers.event: System or user action triggers toast notification
preconditions: User is not in do-not-disturb mode
stateChanges: Toast notification appears from bottom or top of screen
Background color matches notification type (success, error, warning, info)
Icon and message are displayed
Close button and optional action button are visible
Auto-dismiss timer starts counting down
Multiple toasts stack vertically

triggers.event: User clicks notification center icon or badge
stateChanges: Notification center panel or modal opens
Unread notifications are listed at top
Notification badge count clears when center opens
Notifications are marked as read
Scrollable list shows all notifications with timestamps
Archive or delete buttons available for each notification

triggers.event: User clicks action button within notification
stateChanges: Action is executed (navigate, open dialog, trigger function)
Notification may auto-close after action
Action state is logged and tracked
Loading state shows during action execution

transitions.trigger: auto-dismiss timer expires or user clicks close

contracts.name: Drag and Drop in Kanban
contracts.description: Behavioral contract for dragging and dropping cards within and between kanban columns

triggers.event: User presses and holds mouse on card or drags from drag handle
preconditions: Card is not already being dragged
stateChanges: Card becomes draggable and lifts from surface
Drag handle shows visual affordance
Card shadow increases to indicate elevation
Original card position shows placeholder with dashed border
Cursor changes to grab cursor
Scroll containers become drag-sensitive for auto-scroll

triggers.event: User drags card over another column or position
preconditions: Target column is a valid drop zone
stateChanges: Placeholder moves to show drop position in target column
Drop zone highlights with primary color
Cards in target column shift to make space
Target column background highlights
Auto-scroll triggers if dragging near column edges
Drop position is calculated based on cursor location

triggers.event: User releases mouse to drop card in new position
stateChanges: Card animates to final position in target column
Placeholder disappears
Drop zone highlight fades
Card order updates in source and target columns
Server request sent to persist new order
Loading state shows briefly while saving
Column status updates if applicable
WIP limit warnings show if exceeded
Undo option available for a short time

dropFailed.display: Card animates back to original position
dropFailed.action: Show error toast with undo option

wipLimitExceeded.action: Show actionable warning about WIP limit

contracts.name: Search and Command Palette
contracts.description: Behavioral contract for global search, command palette, and fuzzy search interactions

triggers.event: User presses keyboard shortcut (Cmd+K or Ctrl+K) or clicks search icon
stateChanges: Command palette opens as modal or overlay
Search input is auto-focused
Recent commands or suggestions are displayed
Keyboard navigation is enabled
Escape key is registered to close
Overlay behind palette prevents interaction with page

triggers.event: User types in search input field
stateChanges: Search query is captured character by character
Fuzzy search filters results in real-time
Results list updates with matching items
Recent searches are replaced with filtered results
Search highlights matching text in results
Result count shows number of matches
Debounce prevents excessive server calls

triggers.event: User navigates results using arrow keys or clicks item
stateChanges: Selected result is highlighted with primary background
Keyboard navigation moves selection up or down
Clicking result selects it directly
Selected result becomes active for Enter or click action
Results list scrolls to keep selected item in view
Preview or additional info shows for selected item

triggers.event: User presses Enter or clicks on selected result
stateChanges: Command is executed
Palette closes with fade-out animation
Action is performed (navigate, open dialog, execute function)
Loading state shows if command is async
Success or error feedback is shown after execution
Command is added to recent commands history

commandFailed.action: Show error details and retry option

contracts.name: Form Submission and Validation
contracts.description: Behavioral contract for form submission, field validation, error display, and loading states

triggers.event: User leaves form field (blur event)
preconditions: Field has value or is required
stateChanges: Field is validated against rules
Error message appears below field if validation fails
Field border turns red if error
Success indicator shows if validation passes
Helper text may update to show validation status
Other fields are not affected

triggers.event: User clicks submit button or presses Enter in final field
stateChanges: All fields are validated simultaneously
First invalid field receives focus
All errors display at once
If all fields valid, submit button shows loading state
Submit button becomes disabled during submission
Form inputs become disabled to prevent changes
Loading spinner shows in button or overlay
Server request is sent with form data

validationError.display: Error messages show inline on fields

submissionError.action: Keep button disabled until user retries

triggers.event: Form submission succeeds and server responds with success
stateChanges: Loading state clears from button
Success message displays prominently
Form data is cleared or locked from editing
Submit button may become disabled or hide
Success callback is executed
User may be redirected after delay
Confirmation details are shown

transitions.trigger: user blurs field or submits form

contracts.name: File Upload Flow
contracts.description: Behavioral contract for file selection, upload progress, preview, and error handling

triggers.event: User clicks upload button or drags files over drop zone
stateChanges: File picker dialog opens or drag-over zone activates
Drop zone highlights to indicate valid drop area
User selects files from picker
Selected files appear in file list
File previews generate for images
File sizes display next to filenames
Remove buttons appear for each file

triggers.event: User initiates upload by clicking upload button or drag-and-drop completes
preconditions: At least one file is valid
stateChanges: Upload begins for all selected files
Progress bar appears for each file
Upload button becomes disabled
File list becomes read-only
Progress bar animates and shows percentage
Upload speed and remaining time display
Cancel button appears for each file
Overall progress shows across all files

uploadPaused.action: Allow user to pause and resume upload

triggers.event: File upload completes successfully
stateChanges: Progress bar completes to 100%
File shows success checkmark
File becomes locked from removal
Success message displays
File ID or reference is stored
Upload UI may disappear after delay
File appears in completed files list

contracts.name: Multi-Select Operations in Data Grid
contracts.description: Behavioral contract for selecting multiple rows and bulk actions in data tables

triggers.event: User clicks checkbox on table row
stateChanges: Row checkbox becomes checked
Row background highlights
Selection count increments in toolbar
Bulk action toolbar appears if this is first selection
Select-all checkbox shows indeterminate state if partial selection
Action buttons in toolbar become enabled

triggers.event: User clicks select-all checkbox in header
stateChanges: All visible rows become selected
All row checkboxes show checked state
All rows highlight with selection background
Selection badge shows total count
Bulk action toolbar appears
Action buttons become enabled
Select-all checkbox shows checked state

triggers.event: User unchecks row checkbox
stateChanges: Row checkbox becomes unchecked
Row background highlight fades
Selection count decrements
Select-all checkbox updates to unchecked or indeterminate
If no rows selected, bulk action toolbar hides
Action buttons disable if no selections

triggers.event: User clicks bulk action button (delete, assign, export, etc)
stateChanges: Confirmation dialog may appear
Upon confirmation, action is applied to all selected rows
Button shows loading state
Progress indicator shows for long operations
After completion, selection is cleared
Affected rows update in table
Success or error message displays
Toolbar closes

actionFailed.display: Toast error message with retry option

partialFailure.action: Deselect successful rows, keep failed rows selected

transitions.trigger: user deselects all but one row

contracts.name: Modal and Dialog Lifecycle
contracts.description: Behavioral contract for modal and dialog opening, interaction, and closing

triggers.event: User clicks trigger button or action that opens modal
preconditions: User is authorized to view modal
stateChanges: Modal overlay fades in
Dialog content animates up from bottom or scales from center
Focus is trapped within modal
Background page is prevented from scrolling
Close button is visible and accessible
Action buttons are enabled
Initial focus is set to first interactive element

contentLoadError.action: Show retry button or close button

triggers.event: User interacts with modal content (form, buttons, etc)
stateChanges: User can type in input fields
Buttons respond to clicks
Selections update form state
Validation may run on field blur
Changes are tracked but not persisted

triggers.event: User clicks close button or presses Escape to cancel
stateChanges: If changes exist, confirmation dialog may appear
Upon confirmation, modal closes
Dialog animates down or scales out
Overlay fades out
Focus returns to trigger element
Page background is scrollable again
Changes are discarded

triggers.event: User clicks submit or confirm button to close with action
stateChanges: Submit button shows loading state
Form inputs become disabled
Server request is sent with modal data
Upon success, modal closes
Success message displays
Changes are persisted
Calling page updates if needed
Focus returns to trigger element

submissionFailed.action: Show retry button, keep modal open

transitions.trigger: user clicks close with unsaved changes

contracts.name: Navigation Transitions
contracts.description: Behavioral contract for page navigation, route changes, and page transitions

triggers.event: User clicks navigation link or menu item
preconditions: Link is valid and not disabled
Page is not already at destination
stateChanges: Current page content is marked for transition
Loading indicator appears
Page starts fading out or sliding
New page content begins loading
URL changes
Browser history updates
Page scroll resets to top

navigationError.action: Show retry option, keep link highlighted

triggers.event: New page content finishes loading
stateChanges: Loading indicator disappears
New page content fades in
Page animations and interactions become active
Page title updates
Meta tags update
Breadcrumb updates to reflect new location
Page scroll is reset to top

contentLoadError.display: Error state on page with retry button

triggers.event: User clicks back button or uses browser back button
stateChanges: Current page transitions out
Previous page content loads from cache or server
Page scroll position may be restored
URL reverts to previous
Page state is restored if cached

contracts.name: Toast and Snackbar Lifecycle
contracts.description: Behavioral contract for toast and snackbar notifications with auto-dismiss and actions

triggers.event: System or component triggers toast notification display
stateChanges: Toast notification appears on screen
Background color matches toast type
Icon and message are displayed
Auto-dismiss timer starts
Multiple toasts stack vertically
Progress bar shows remaining time

triggers.event: User clicks action button in toast
stateChanges: Action is executed immediately
Toast may remain visible or close depending on action
Loading state may show during action
Result or feedback is shown

triggers.event: User clicks close button or auto-dismiss timer expires
stateChanges: Toast animates out
Toast is removed from DOM
Remaining toasts move up if stacked
If auto-dismissed, no confirmation required

contracts.name: Date Picker Interaction
contracts.description: Behavioral contract for date picker components with calendar selection and range picking

triggers.event: User clicks date input field or calendar icon
stateChanges: Calendar popup opens below input
Current month is displayed
Today is highlighted with special styling
Selected date is highlighted if exists
Keyboard navigation is enabled
Escape key closes calendar

triggers.event: User clicks previous or next month button
stateChanges: Calendar animates to show new month
Month and year header updates
Date cells update for new month
Disabled dates update if applicable
Selection is maintained across navigation

triggers.event: User clicks date cell in calendar
stateChanges: Clicked date becomes selected
Selected date cell highlights
Input field populates with selected date
Calendar closes automatically
Focus returns to input field
Selected state is stored

triggers.event: User selects start and end dates for range picker
stateChanges: First click sets start date
Date cell highlights for start date
Calendar remains open for end date selection
Second click sets end date
Date range is highlighted between dates
Input fields populate with start and end dates
Calendar closes after end date selection

invalidRange.display: End date cannot be before start date
invalidRange.action: Swap dates or require new selection

transitions.trigger: user selects start date in range mode

contracts.name: Stepper and Step Progression
contracts.description: Behavioral contract for multi-step forms and wizards with validation and progression

triggers.event: User views initial step or navigates to step
stateChanges: Step indicator highlights current step
Step content displays with fade-in animation
Progress bar updates to show progression
Previous button is disabled on first step
Next button is enabled if current step valid
Breadcrumb shows step sequence

triggers.event: User clicks next button to proceed to next step
stateChanges: Current step validates
If validation fails, errors display
If validation passes, current step data saves
Step indicator shows completion checkmark
Content slides to next step
Progress bar increments
Next step becomes active

triggers.event: User clicks previous button to return to prior step
stateChanges: Current step data is saved (optionally)
Current step becomes inactive
Previous step indicator becomes active
Content slides to previous step
Progress bar decrements
Previous step fields repopulate with saved data
Next button enables if at non-final step

triggers.event: User clicks submit button on final step
stateChanges: Final step validates
If valid, all step data is submitted
Submit button shows loading state
Form inputs disable
Completion animation plays
Success screen or message displays
Redirect or next action occurs

validationError.display: Inline validation errors on final step

transitions.trigger: user clicks submit on final step
